test.name: Scenario: Login with empty username

kw.name: Given I am on the Mobak login page
Open Mobak Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens the browser and navigates to login page

kw.name: When I fill credentials with "" and "senha123"
kw.source_name: When I fill credentials with "${user}" and "${pass}"

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And I click the login button
Submit Login
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button

kw.name: Then I should see an error message
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Wait Until Element Is Visible' got positional argument after named arguments.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Wait Until Element Is Visible' got positional argument after named arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.status: Keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Wait Until Element Is Visible' got positional argument after named arguments.

kw.name: Close Session
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the browser

test.status: Keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Wait Until Element Is Visible' got positional argument after named arguments.
